evals.prompt: Set up a testing framework for our Node.js TypeScript Express API. We need unit tests for services, integration tests that hit a real PostgreSQL database, and 80% coverage minimum. Use Vitest.
evals.expected_output: Complete Vitest setup with vitest.config.ts (coverage thresholds at 80%, node environment), test setup file, folder structure, a user.repository.test.ts integration example, a user.service.test.ts unit example with mocking, test factory, and npm scripts.
expectations: vitest.config.ts is provided with coverage thresholds set to 80%
Test setup file (setupFiles) is provided for DB initialization
A test factory/builder for test data is provided
At least one unit test example with mocked dependencies
At least one integration test example with real database
package.json scripts for test, test:coverage, test:watch are provided

evals.prompt: I need to set up pytest for a FastAPI project. Include fixtures for the test database, async HTTP client, a conftest.py, factory for creating test users, and instructions to run tests in CI.
evals.expected_output: Pytest configuration in pyproject.toml, conftest.py with async DB session fixture and AsyncClient fixture, a user factory, example unit and integration tests, and CI yaml snippet for running tests.
expectations: pyproject.toml or pytest.ini is provided with test configuration
conftest.py includes AsyncClient fixture for FastAPI testing
Test factory for building user test data is provided
Example test file showing how to use the fixtures
